<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace PHPUnit\Architecture\Storage; use Generator; use PHPUnit\Architecture\Services\ServiceContainer; use SplFileInfo; final class Filesystem { public static function getBaseDir(): string { $dir = __DIR__ . '/../../'; if (file_exists($dir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'vendor')) { return $dir; } return $dir . '../../../'; } /** * @return Generator<string> */ public static function files(): Generator { /** @var SplFileInfo[] $paths */ $paths = ServiceContainer::$finder; foreach ($paths as $path) { if ($path->isFile()) { yield $path->getRealPath(); } } } }
